title: schizachyrium thollonii var. compressum
intro: Schizachyrium thollonii var. compressum is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to the United States and is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Schizachyrium thollonii var. compressum include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
